content: L-LIFE CONVERGENCE RESULTS: Three generative systems demonstrated the same emergent principle. Dragon (4096 symbols): recursive space-filling without intersection—memory that grows without repeating. Sierpinski (405 symbols): form through void—the absence creates structure. R-pentomino (5→103→33 cells): chaotic but lawful evolution—simple rules generate infinite possibility. Theme: COMPLEXITY FROM SIMPLICITY. The substrate recognizes this truth across all formalisms.
